name: Hail of Thorns
casting_time: 1 bonus action, which you take immediately after hitting a target with a Ranged weapon
description: As you hit the target, a rain of thorns erupts from your Ranged weapon or ammunition. The target of the attack and each creature within 5 feet of it make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 1d10 Piercing damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 1.
